configurations.name: pantry-host
runtimeArgs: set -a && source .env.local && export DEFAULT_THEME=claude && set +a && npx @limlabs/rex dev --root packages/app --host 0.0.0.0

configurations.name: graphql-server
runtimeArgs: cd packages/app && set -a && source ../../.env.local && set +a && npx tsx graphql-server.ts
